title: Theme System Light and Dark Approach
content: The Powerhouse design system implements theming through CSS custom properties with two modes. The :root selector defines light theme values as the default. The .dark class or [data-theme="dark"] attribute selector overrides those values for dark mode. For Achra and Vetra, the primary brand colors persist unchanged across themes: Achra stays #7A3AFF and Vetra stays #04C161 in both light and dark. The Powerhouse parent brand behaves differently -- its primary inverts from #32373B (dark neutral) in light mode to #F3F5F7 (light neutral) in dark mode, with --primary-foreground similarly inverting from #FFFFFF to #0E0E0D. All three brands share the same dark theme values for secondary (#4F596F), muted-foreground (#6C7275), and other non-primary surface tokens, though Powerhouse uses darker background values (#0E0E0D vs #1B1E24). Source: colors.css files at https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems.
description: Light theme uses :root selector, dark theme uses .dark class or [data-theme="dark"] attribute. Primary colors persist or invert by brand.
